## Checklist
- [ ] Conventional Commits message
- [ ] No hardcoded dates (use `schedule.yaml`) — *if roadmap/status touched*
- [ ] Translations do not get ahead of English `README.md` — *if i18n*
- [ ] Honest-grading notices preserved (local LLM = estimate; speaking = indirect)
- [ ] Host-discovery copies (`.claude/skills`, `.codex/skills`) synced — *if SKILL.md touched*
